Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp. is present. Represented by Leddell Stewart.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Bruce Taylor present.
Attorney Laura Chiera representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-29-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
